notes:
The Phantom Thieves have infiltrated Call of Duty®: Mobile Season 6: Take Your Heart. Answer the Calling Card and deploy as Persona 5 Royal-inspired Operators, including Joker, Panther, and more. Secure the treasure in an all-new Battle Royale LTM, then wield the Mythic FFS Hurricane to complete the perfect heist. Take your time, then Take Over. 

Persona 5 Royal x CODM 

Another season of collaboration is here! Experience a first-of-its-kind integration featuring Legendary Operators inspired by

title: Kingdom Guard:Tower Defense TD
notes:
"【NEW】
1. The Annual Feast Event is opening soon, with the opening date from July 20, 2026 to July 27, 2026.
2. The 【TRIAL OF THE STRONG】 Event adds a points Event; consuming Advanced Potential Stone will gain Event points.
3. Added Skin Item recycling Feature. After owning a permanent Skin, duplicate Skin Items can be recycled in the Bag.
【OPTIMIZATION】
1. Optimized the 5th anniversary letter; after the event page is closed, players can still Open and View the letter in Normal status."
